title: habenaria stenantha var. auriculata
intro: Habenaria stenantha var. auriculata, also known as the Golden-eared Habenaria, is a species of orchid native to the Himalayas and other parts of Asia. This plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Habenaria stenantha var. auriculata include treating various health conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction, powder, or extract, and is used to treat various health issues.
